publicPurpose: Audience-facing map for moving fans through Lux Veritas music, film, events, membership, drops, and submissions.
headline: The world opens by return.
summary: Lux Veritas is built so a fan can enter through one signal and keep finding the next door: music, visuals, rooms, drops, story, and creation moving together.

stages.label: Listen
stages.title: Start With Sound
stages.body: Music is the first signal: releases, sessions, radio moments, and artist worlds that give the larger universe a pulse.

stages.label: Watch
stages.title: See the World
stages.body: Visual chapters, cinematic language, and selected previews turn the sound into atmosphere, story, and image.

stages.label: Join
stages.title: Enter the Circle
stages.body: First access creates a clean fan path for early release notes, private drops, listening rooms, and future member identity.

stages.label: Attend
stages.title: Find the Room
stages.body: Listening rooms, salons, screenings, and destination gatherings turn attention into presence and shared memory.

stages.label: Collect
stages.title: Hold the Drop
stages.body: Selected objects, editions, garments, books, and release-linked pieces let supporters carry the world beyond the screen.

stages.label: Create
stages.title: Approach the Source
stages.body: Artists, creators, story builders, and partners can enter through screened submissions when the fit is aligned.
